summary: Tested PVP Game WebSocket and related APIs for critical bug fix. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend Photo Game Arena loads correctly with PVP Battle Arena UI. PVP components (PVPRoundReady, PVPBattleArena) are properly implemented with data-testid attributes and WebSocket integration.
critical_code_review_comments: PVPRoundReady.jsx: Well-implemented with per-round photo selection, ready button, and countdown overlay
PVPBattleArena.jsx: Proper WebSocket connection with reconnection logic and message handling
pvp_game_websocket.py: Server-authoritative countdown with millisecond precision broadcasts
game_routes.py: pvp_room_id creation on game start with proper WebSocket URL in response
seed_data_creation: None - test user has no minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP Game WebSocket endpoint /ws/pvp-game/{room_id}/{token} is working. Backend logs show 'PVP Game WebSocket loaded'. Test user has no minted photos so cannot test actual PVP gameplay. Full end-to-end PVP testing requires two browser sessions with users who have 5+ minted photos each.

implementation_notes.per_round_ready_mechanism: Implemented in PVPRoundReady.jsx with selecting -> ready -> countdown -> playing phases
implementation_notes.server_authoritative_countdown: Implemented in pvp_game_websocket.py with countdown_tick broadcasts every second
implementation_notes.opponent_photo_display: Implemented via round_ready and round_start WebSocket events with full photo data
